name: the-fourth-turning-an-american-prophecy
description: William Strauss and Neil Howe's The Fourth Turning: An American Prophecy — a generational theory and historical cycles toolkit mapping American history into repeating 80-100 year saeculum cycles of four turnings (High, Awakening, Unraveling, Crisis) driven by four generational archetypes (Prophet, Nomad, Hero, Artist), predicting the Crisis of the 2020s.
useCase: Understand the generational cycles that shape history — where we are in the saeculum, what generational archetype you belong to, and how to navigate the crisis period.
knownRisks: The Strauss-Howe theory is controversial and not widely accepted by academic historians
The cycle framework can be used to justify fatalism ('the crisis is inevitable')
The book was written before 9/11 and many predictions are vague enough to be interpreted after the fact
